source_jobs.title: Frontend Engineer (CZ)
source_jobs.description:
🚀 About Myriad

We are building a reliable and scalable AI-powered platform that allows US companies to put regulatory compliance on autopilot.




At its core, Myriad is an engineering-driven company, founded by individuals with robust technical backgrounds, forged in Silicon Valley and molded by necessity.

Myriad's software engineers are at the forefront of developing next-generation technologies that revolutionize the way enterprises manage their compliance.

We employ individuals with a diverse range of technical abilities who are eager to address some of the most challenging issues in technology and create a significant impact on users worldwide.

Our engineering team comes from reputable companies:


[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/8fc2c9d0-e661-481f-b65d-e6c70a9fccae/60ab20f5-5a0b-4e28-9dc3-33587cfb0b73/ab1b059959680dd5673c47d8288e9e74.png]

❓Why compliance?

Compliance isn’t just about regulations and checkboxes—it’s the foundation of trust, stability, and ethical progress in our global economy. It safeguards financial systems from fraud, protects consumers from exploitation, and ensures businesses operate with integrity.

In fintech, compliance is a catalyst for innovation. It enables secure digital transactions, prevents money laundering, and fosters financial inclusion by ensuring that emerging technologies remain safe and accountable. From AI-driven risk monitoring to real-time fraud detection, compliance empowers businesses to scale responsibly while protecting society from financial crime.

At its core, compliance is about fairness, security, and trust—paving the way for a more transparent and ethical financial future. It’s not just a regulatory requirement; it’s a force for good, shaping a world where businesses thrive while protecting people and institutions alike.

💸 We are backed by top US and EU venture capital with several years of runway

Read about us on cc.cz http://cc.cz and hn.cz http://hn.cz


[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/8fc2c9d0-e661-481f-b65d-e6c70a9fccae/ba814758-7043-48da-8a14-0f30b8f93940/a9d5747411c4fdb043210c46e5577203.png]

Ralf https://www.linkedin.com/in/ralfschoenherr/ and Jan https://www.linkedin.com/in/jan-spidlen/, Myriad AI founders.


🤗 What we offer

 - You can be a part of the core engineering team of a newly created and VC-backed startup

 - Silicon Valley-style company => stock options and/or RSUs!

 - Steep career growth opportunities through continuous growth and our Silicon Valley pedigree

 - Technical Founders (experience from Google, Amazon, BMW, Airbnb, Dropbox, NVIDIA)

 - Competitive salary and benefits

 - Prague and San Francisco offices, we are a multi-homed company with a hybrid approach to work (biz travel to Silicon Valley)

 - Paid Time Off (Vacation, Sick & Public Holidays)

 - Flat hierarchies and open feedback culture
   

🎉 About You

 - You contribute fresh perspectives in a variety of domains, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, high performance FE applications, etc.

 - You pay a great attention to UX/UI details

 - You know how to design, develop testing, deploy, maintain, and enhance software solutions

 - You are comfortable managing project priorities, deadlines, and deliverables, and demonstrate leadership capabilities

 - You are eager to address some of the most challenging issues in technology and create a significant impact on users worldwide

 - You love being mission-driven and want to join an early stage Silicon Valley based startup
   

📖 Minimum qualifications

 - Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.

 - 5 years of experience with front-end development or FS - such as Java, Python, GO, or C++ codebases, or front-end including JavaScript, TypeScript, Svelte HTML, CSS, or equivalent.

 - Good at designing clean APIs.
   

📖 Preferred qualifications

 - 5+ years of experience front-end including JavaSc

source_jobs.title: Senior Growth Marketing Manager (CZ)
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR GROWTH MARKETING MANAGER (CZ)

🚀 ABOUT MYRIAD

We are building a reliable and scalable AI-powered platform that enables US companies to put regulatory compliance on autopilot.

At its core, Myriad is an engineering-driven company, founded by technical leaders shaped in Silicon Valley and driven by necessity. Our engineering team comes from companies such as Google, Amazon, BMW, Airbnb, Dropbox, and NVIDIA, and is focused on developing next-generation technologies that transform how enterprises manage compliance.

We hire people with diverse technical backgrounds who want to solve hard problems and make a meaningful impact on users worldwide. We are backed by top US and EU venture capital with several years of runway, and we are preparing for significant public announcements in the coming months.

Our engineering team comes from reputable companies:

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/8fc2c9d0-e661-481f-b65d-e6c70a9fccae/8179b92b-bd27-4123-ad09-257a1ba17a2a/image.png]

Compliance isn’t just a box-ticking exercise. It is the foundation of trust, stability, and ethical progress in the global economy. It prevents fraud, protects consumers, and ensures that financial systems operate with integrity. In fintech and regulated industries, it fuels innovation by enabling secure transactions, preventing money laundering, and ensuring responsible growth. It’s a force for good, shaping a world where businesses thrive while protecting people and institutions.

Read about us on cc.cz http://cc.cz and hn.cz http://hn.cz.



🤗 WHAT WE OFFER

 - Be part of the core team of a fast-growing, VC-backed startup.

 - Silicon Valley–style environment - including stock options and/or RSUs.

 - Steep career growth supported by technical founders with global experience.

 - Competitive salary and benefits.

 - Paid Time Off.

 - Flat hierarchies and a culture of transparency and open feedback.



[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/8fc2c9d0-e661-481f-b65d-e6c70a9fccae/de4399a3-87a7-42aa-9f16-aa05ef4fc61b/image.png]

Myriad AI team



🎯 SENIOR GROWTH MARKETING MANAGER



👨‍🔬 ABOUT THE ROLE

We are hiring our first Marketing team member, someone who can combine strategic thinking with hands-on execution and who is excited to build Myriad’s growth engine from the ground up.

You will drive performance and conversion-focused marketing across all channels, set up scalable growth systems, partner closely with our founders, and directly influence how Myriad appears to customers, candidates, and the global market. This is a high-ownership role designed for someone who enjoys moving quickly, experimenting, and iterating based on data.

You’ll work closely with design, product, engineering, and the sales team to develop assets, build funnels, and execute campaigns that support our go-to-market motion. We’re looking for someone who is both analytical and creative, equally comfortable evaluating metrics, writing landing page copy, or launching paid campaigns.



🎉 RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Drive and optimize performance marketing across digital channels with a focus on conversions and measurable impact.

 - Plan, execute, and analyze end-to-end growth campaigns with full hands-on ownership.

 - Collaborate with our designer and cross-functional teams to create high-quality marketing assets.

 - Manage, maintain, and evolve our website content with support from our front-end team.

 - Lead and grow Myriad’s social media presence, with a focus on LinkedIn.

 - Plan and run webinars, including promotion, logistics, follow-up, and lead nurturing.

 - Oversee sponsored content, partnerships, and distribution opportunities.

 - Build out the Myriad AI learning platform

 - Coordinate company presence at trade shows, including pre-event preparation and post-event lead management.

 - Support copywriting needs; writing articles is a plus

 - Analyze marketing performance, report insights, and continuously optimize funnels.

 - Work closely with
